summary: Specialist 11 FACTION & REPUTATION AUDIT: 10 checks (2 CRITICAL fixed, 1 HIGH fixed, 2 MEDIUM open, 5 PASS). CRITICAL: faction_ending_chosen signal unwired in game_flow_controller.wire_end_screen() — FIXED. HIGH: test_constants_bible_alignment.gd FACTION_SCORE_START asserted 0, actual 20 — FIXED. biome dominant_faction unused for card routing (MEDIUM). No faction_endings_chosen persistence field (MEDIUM). 6 new tasks generated.

findings.title: faction_ending_chosen signal UNWIRED in game_flow_controller
findings.description: wire_end_screen() connected hub_requested only. faction_ending_chosen emitted by end_run_screen.gd:409/463 had zero listeners — player faction choice had no effect on meta/progression. FIXED: added connect/disconnect + _on_faction_ending_chosen() handler that records faction to echo_memory.dominant_factions_seen and saves profile.

findings.title: test_constants_bible_alignment.gd stale FACTION_SCORE_START assertion
findings.description: Test asserted FACTION_SCORE_START == 0, but value is 20 (neutral start). Constant was updated to 20 to avoid hostile penalty on run 1. Test was never updated. FIXED: changed expected value to 20.

findings.title: Biome dominant_faction constant unused for card content routing
findings.description: BIOMES dict has dominant_faction per biome (druides, anciens, etc.) per director q-20260413-002. merlin_card_system.gd and llm_adapter_prompts.gd use player's actual highest rep as {dominant_faction}, NOT biome's natural faction. merlin_skeleton_generator.gd uses it for path shortcut only. Cards for a Korrigans biome don't naturally bias toward Korrigans content.

findings.title: No faction_endings_chosen tracking in save profile
findings.description: echo_memory has dominant_factions_seen[] but _on_faction_ending_chosen() now records there. However, there is no dedicated 'faction_endings_chosen' field to distinguish 'highest rep faction' from 'actually completed faction ending'. The LLM has no signal that 'player chose Ankou ending in run 5'.

findings.title: Thresholds 50/80 correctly implemented
findings.description: THRESHOLD_CONTENT=50, THRESHOLD_ENDING=80 defined in both MerlinReputationSystem and MerlinConstants. get_available_endings() uses >= 80, get_unlocked_content() uses >= 50. All correct.

findings.title: check_run_end() includes faction_endings_available in all 3 end paths
findings.description: store_run.gd check_run_end(): death path (line 218), victory path (line 237), hard_max path (line 256) all include faction_endings_available from get_available_endings(). Correct.

findings.title: Cross-run faction_rep persistence correct
findings.description: _apply_faction_reputation() writes to state['meta']['faction_rep'], which is saved via save_system.save_profile(meta). No decay. All cross-run persistence implemented correctly.

findings.title: Cap ±20/card enforced at two layers
findings.description: merlin_effect_engine._apply_faction_reputation() clamps delta to clampi(delta, -20, 20). MerlinReputationSystem.add_reputation() also clamps to ±CAP_PER_CARD. Double enforcement. Correct.

findings.title: All 5 factions defined and initialized consistently
findings.description: FACTIONS = [druides, anciens, korrigans, niamh, ankou] in both MerlinConstants and MerlinReputationSystem. merlin_store.gd initializes all 5 at FACTION_SCORE_START=20. Consistent.

findings.title: EndRunScreen multi-faction choice UI implemented
findings.description: end_run_screen._on_continue_pressed(): 0 factions -> hub_requested, 1 faction -> auto-selects, 2+ factions -> choice panel. _show_faction_choice_panel() creates buttons correctly. Now correctly wired via game_flow_controller.

checks.check: EndRunScreen displays faction choice UI for 2+ factions
